summary: Good recording with a nostalgic NRPS warm‑up; track listing needs correction but overall enjoyable.
review: Reviewers gave this set‑by‑disc (sbd) tape four stars, noting that the performance includes a pleasant New Riders of the Purple Sage warm‑up and classic Dead material like Cumberland Blues. The main issue cited is a mislabeling of tracks from #19 onward, but no audio quality problems were mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) with limited detail; rating reflects the positive impression despite missing information on sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about clarity, mix, or source type; reviewers only noted track‑listing errors.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Track titles from #19 onward are shifted, causing confusion in the setlist; otherwise the show proceeds normally.
